name: swallowtail butterfly
comments: Swallowtail butterflies (Papilionidae) are one family of true butterflies within the order Lepidoptera.

name: seal
comments: Phocidae are the true (earless) seals. This does not include sea lions or fur seals, which belong to Otariidae.

name: luna moth
comments: Luna moths (Actias luna) belong to the family Saturniidae. 'Moth' is not a formal group — it refers to any Lepidoptera that is not a butterfly.
